Interface IAngularUnit

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the properties of angular unit.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("74AD43F0-D31C-11D1-BC9B-0000F875BCCE")]
public interface IAngularUnit : IUnit, ISpatialReferenceInfo
